description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a sleek, tactical design, featuring a prominent cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The body is primarily composed of dark blue and black metal with orange highlights, giving it a striking, urban camouflage appearance. The rifle has a curved detachable magazine, a pistol grip, and a fixed stock integrated into the rear of the receiver. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip, and the top of the receiver features simple iron sights. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet durable build, suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The combination of materials and colors indicates a focus on both functionality and visual intimidation.
description: A compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a suppressor, dark blue and black body, orange highlights, and a curved magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the suppressor, ribbed handguard, curved magazine, pistol grip, and fixed stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the fixed stock and the slim profile of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine release and ejection port.
